product_context.safety_class_rationale: Software that can contribute to hazardous situations through incorrect triage recommendations. Contraindications exclude life-threatening conditions, and practitioner oversight provides additional safety layer.

risk_model.chain: Hazard → Sequence (P1) → Hazardous Situation → Harm (S, P2)
risk_model.p1_description: Probability sequence leads to hazardous situation
risk_model.p2_description: Probability hazardous situation results in specific harm
risk_model.rpn_calculation: RPN = S × P (where P derived from P1 × P2)

intended_uses.name: Patient triage to appropriate level of care
intended_uses.description: Triage24 is intended to provide patients with a recommendation of an appropriate level of care, based on urgency of symptoms reported by the user.
intended_uses.medical_purpose: Investigation of a patient's pathological state through patient-reported symptoms to determine appropriate level of care
intended_uses.target_population: Outpatient care patients seeking care for common conditions, ages 0-120
contraindications: Patients with life-threatening symptoms, serious conditions or trauma
Patients physically or cognitively unable to use digital technology
Patients lacking sufficient language proficiency (conversational variant)

intended_uses.name: Assisted triage by healthcare practitioners
intended_uses.description: Healthcare practitioners perform automated triage on behalf of patients who cannot use the digital interface
intended_uses.medical_purpose: Enable standardized triage using the same medical content and business rules as patient self-triage
intended_uses.target_population: Patients who cannot use digital patient interface

intended_uses.name: Medical content and business rules configuration
intended_uses.description: Configure triage logic to fit specific healthcare provider needs
intended_uses.medical_purpose: Enable healthcare providers to configure triage logic for their workflows

user_intents.name: View triage results and exit attributes

safety_characteristics.question: What is the intended use?
safety_characteristics.assessment: Digital triage for primary care - collects symptoms, applies clinical rules, guides care pathway

safety_characteristics.question: Is the device intended to be interpretive?
safety_characteristics.assessment: Rule engine interprets symptoms via clinical decision rules to determine urgency levels

safety_characteristics.question: Is software incorporated?
safety_characteristics.assessment: System is SaMD. 7 software items, Safety Class B.

safety_characteristics.question: Is successful use critically dependent on human factors?
safety_characteristics.assessment: Patient data entry critical for accuracy. Practitioner interpretation required.

safety_characteristics.question: Could the device be susceptible to deliberate misuse?
safety_characteristics.assessment: Patient could provide false symptoms. SessionStorage manipulation possible.

safety_characteristics.question: Does the device hold data critical to patient care?
safety_characteristics.assessment: Stores symptom data, triage results, consent records, appointment data

safety_characteristics.question: Does the device have essential performance?
safety_characteristics.assessment: Triage accuracy and availability are essential for safe care routing

core_functionalities.name: Triage interview execution
core_functionalities.description: Interviewer Service executes triage interviews by processing patient information, evaluating responses against medical content

core_functionalities.name: Business rules evaluation
core_functionalities.description: Business Rules Engine generates recommendations by applying configured rules to exit attributes

core_functionalities.name: Medical content interpretation
core_functionalities.description: Interprets configured medical content for appropriate questions and exit conditions

core_functionalities.name: Exit attribute generation
core_functionalities.description: Generates standardized exit attributes: urgency level, capability, level of care

core_functionalities.name: Recommendation page generation
core_functionalities.description: Generates recommendation with care routing options based on exit attributes

core_functionalities.name: Interview locking
core_functionalities.description: Locks interview after completion or alarming exit, preventing further modification

core_functionalities.name: Find condition module (form-based)
core_functionalities.description: Search functionality for symptom/condition selection triggering appropriate questionnaire

core_functionalities.name: Structured questionnaire presentation
core_functionalities.description: Questions presented with predefined answer options

core_functionalities.name: Question navigation
core_functionalities.description: Navigation within interview to edit previously answered questions

software_items.name: interviewer4
software_items.description: Interview and questionnaire service for collecting patient symptoms

software_items.name: rule-engine-module
software_items.description: Rule engine evaluating clinical triage rules

software_items.name: object-storage
software_items.description: File storage service with AES-256 encryption

system_hazards.description: Patient receives incorrect triage recommendation due to rule engine or interview data failure

sequences_of_events.name: Rule engine returns wrong recommendation
steps: 2. Interview data passed to rule engine
3. Rule package has defect or misconfiguration
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Occasional: Rule packages validated before deploy, but complex interactions possible

sequences_of_events.name: Patient enters incorrect symptoms
steps: 2. UI confusing or medical terminology unclear
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Probable: B1-B2 language proficiency users, medical terminology common

hazardous_situations.description: Patient directed to inappropriate level of care based on wrong triage result

harms.description: Delayed treatment for urgent condition (under-triage)
harms.S_rationale: Critical: Delayed urgent care could cause permanent impairment
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Wrong triage leads to harm in ~10-50% of cases

harms.description: Unnecessary emergency visit, patient anxiety (over-triage)
harms.S_rationale: Minor: Anxiety and wasted resources, no physical harm
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Over-triage also possible outcome

residual_risk.P1_calc: Rule validation + practitioner training reduce P1

system_hazards.description: Wrong patient data displayed to practitioner causing treatment for wrong patient

sequences_of_events.name: Race condition in patient search
steps: 1. Practitioner searches for patient by name
2. Multiple patients with similar names returned
4. API response for patient B arrives late and overwrites display
5. Practitioner views patient B's data as patient A
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Occasional: Race conditions possible with slow network

sequences_of_events.name: Practitioner selects wrong patient
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Probable: Human error common with similar names

hazardous_situations.description: Practitioner conducts clinical decision-making using wrong patient's data

harms.description: Patient receives contraindicated treatment based on wrong history/allergies
harms.S_rationale: Catastrophic: Contraindicated treatment could cause death
harms.P2_rationale: Remote: Contraindication match between wrong patient's data and correct patient's condition unlikely

harms.description: Urgent condition missed - wrong patient's symptoms appear non-urgent
harms.S_rationale: Critical: Delayed urgent care could cause permanent impairment
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Symptom mismatch may hide urgency

harms.description: Inappropriate care routing delays needed treatment
harms.S_rationale: Serious: Delay may require additional intervention but recoverable
harms.P2_rationale: Probable: Wrong data likely leads to suboptimal routing

residual_risk.P1_calc: Patient verification dialog + session isolation + independent verification procedure

system_hazards.description: Clinical rules fail to load or update, system operates with stale rules

sequences_of_events.name: Rule package fails to load
steps: 1. System starts or requires rule update
2. Rule package file corrupted or unavailable
4. System operates without current rules or falls back
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Remote: Deployment validation, monitoring in place

sequences_of_events.name: Silent rule corruption
steps: 3. RuleVerifier passes syntax but logic wrong
4. Incorrect rules execute for extended period
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Remote: Checksums and validation reduce probability

hazardous_situations.description: System operates without current clinical rules
Corrupted rules execute affecting multiple patients

harms.description: Multiple patients triaged with outdated logic until detected
harms.S_rationale: Critical: Outdated rules may miss new conditions or use superseded thresholds
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Impact depends on what changed in rules

harms.description: Systematic triage errors affect patient population
harms.S_rationale: Critical: Corrupted logic could systematically under-triage
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Corruption may affect critical paths

system_hazards.description: Urgent condition not identified due to missed alarming exit

sequences_of_events.name: Alarming exit not triggered by symptoms
steps: 1. Patient with urgent symptoms starts triage
2. Symptoms entered but alarming criteria not matched
4. Normal exit instead of alarming exit
5. Patient not directed to emergency care
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Occasional: Medical content extensively validated, but edge cases possible

sequences_of_events.name: Urgency indicator not noticed
steps: 3. Practitioner misses indicator during high workload
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Probable: Usability not verified, high workload normal

hazardous_situations.description: Patient with urgent condition not directed to appropriate emergency care

harms.description: Delayed emergency care for life-threatening condition
harms.S_rationale: Catastrophic: Missed emergency could result in death
harms.P2_rationale: Remote: Contraindications exclude life-threatening, but edge cases exist

harms.description: Urgent condition deteriorates due to delayed treatment
harms.S_rationale: Critical: Permanent impairment possible from delay
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Delayed urgent care leads to worsening in 10-50% of cases

residual_risk.P1_calc: Contraindications + 112 warnings reduce exposure to life-threatening, but usability gap remains
residual_risk.condition: Requires usability testing for urgency indicator visibility

system_hazards.description: Wrong patient executes clinical action (booking, referral)

sequences_of_events.name: Session context confusion on shared device
steps: 1. Patient A completes triage on shared device
2. Session expires or tab left open
4. Patient B triggers action with Patient A's context
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Occasional: Shared devices common in waiting rooms

hazardous_situations.description: Care action executed for wrong patient based on another's triage

harms.description: Wrong patient receives care appointment based on another's triage
harms.S_rationale: Critical: Wrong care type could cause harm
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Downstream systems may not detect mismatch

harms.description: Correct patient does not receive needed care
harms.S_rationale: Serious: Original patient's care delayed but will re-triage
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Patient may notice missing appointment

harms.description: Confidentiality breach - patient sees another's care plan
harms.S_rationale: Serious: Privacy violation, regulatory implications
harms.P2_rationale: Probable: If session confused, data exposure likely

residual_risk.P1_calc: Patient ID validation + session binding + action state validation
residual_risk.P2_residual_rationale: Remote: Booking systems have additional verification

system_hazards.description: SQL injection compromises system database and encryption keys

sequences_of_events.name: Malicious SQL injection attack
steps: 1. Attacker identifies API endpoint accepting labels
5. If escapeString fails, payload reaches SQL
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Occasional: Requires attacker access, escapeString protection UNVERIFIED

sequences_of_events.name: Internal malformed label causes SQL error
steps: 1. Internal system generates label with SQL metacharacters
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Remote: Internal systems generate safe labels typically

harms.description: Mass patient data breach - PHI exposed
harms.S_rationale: Catastrophic: Privacy breach affecting all patients
harms.P2_rationale: Probable: If injection succeeds, exfiltration straightforward

harms.description: Database corruption/deletion affecting care
harms.S_rationale: Catastrophic: Loss of patient data affects all patients
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Attacker may corrupt/delete, but exfiltration usually primary goal

harms.description: System compromised for lateral attacks
harms.S_rationale: Critical: Lateral movement to other healthcare systems
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: DB access may enable privilege escalation

harms.description: Wrong patient data returned causing clinical error
harms.S_rationale: Critical: Wrong data could lead to wrong decision
harms.P2_rationale: Remote: Malformed query more likely to fail than return plausible wrong data

residual_risk.condition: CRITICAL: Requires security testing verification of escapeString

system_hazards.description: Interview data lost or corrupted during transfer to rule engine

sequences_of_events.name: Data corruption during interview-to-rule-engine transfer
steps: 2. Interview data serialized for rule engine
5. Triage result based on corrupted input
sequences_of_events.P1_rationale: Remote: Database transactions + typed interfaces reduce risk

hazardous_situations.description: Rule engine evaluates triage with corrupted patient data
Patient answers not persisted but interview continues

harms.description: Wrong triage recommendation from corrupted symptom data
harms.S_rationale: Serious: Wrong recommendation may delay needed care
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Corrupted data may or may not affect outcome

harms.description: Incomplete triage record - important symptoms not captured
harms.S_rationale: Serious: Missing data could affect practitioner decision
harms.P2_rationale: Remote: Missing answers usually caught by UI or patient

system_hazards.description: Patient consent not properly recorded before treatment

sequences_of_events.name: Consent submission fails silently
steps: 2. Network error during consent API call
3. UI does not clearly indicate failure

sequences_of_events.name: Consent timestamp mismatch
steps: 4. Audit shows consent after treatment start

hazardous_situations.description: Treatment proceeds without valid consent record
Consent audit trail shows regulatory non-compliance

harms.description: Treatment without valid consent - legal/ethical violation
harms.S_rationale: Serious: Legal implications, patient autonomy violated
harms.P2_rationale: Remote: Most consent failures would be caught before treatment

harms.description: Patient denied care due to consent recording failure
harms.S_rationale: Serious: Delayed care while consent issue resolved
harms.P2_rationale: Occasional: Strict systems may block without consent record

harms.description: Regulatory finding - inadequate consent audit trail
harms.S_rationale: Minor: No direct patient harm, organizational impact
harms.P2_rationale: Remote: Timestamp issues detectable and correctable

system_risk_controls.description: Clinical validation of medical content and questionnaire logic
system_risk_controls.implementation: Medical content review and approval process before production deployment (D361 training required)

system_risk_controls.description: Mandatory attribute validation at rule engine input
system_risk_controls.implementation: RuleEngine.assertInput() validates all mandatory attributes before execution

system_risk_controls.description: Practitioner training on triage interpretation and limitations
system_risk_controls.implementation: Practitioners trained that own clinical assessment must be used together with triage result

system_risk_controls.description: Patient identity verification at action execution
system_risk_controls.implementation: verifyPatient() validates patient ID matches action's patient before execution
Practitioner must verify patient identity through procedure independent of software

system_risk_controls.description: Rule package validation at load time
system_risk_controls.implementation: RuleVerifier validates syntax, duplicate IDs, type compatibility before deployment

system_risk_controls.description: Graceful degradation when rule engine unavailable
system_risk_controls.implementation: System implements fallback triage path when automated triage unavailable
Contraindications state that patients with life-threatening symptoms should not use automated triage. Warning: 'Vid livshotande eller akuta besvär - ring 112'

system_risk_controls.description: Action state validation and idempotent execution
system_risk_controls.implementation: Action.assertActive() and idempotent execution check prevent duplicate/wrong patient actions
Direct queries use ? placeholders with args

system_risk_controls.description: Label value escaping for LIKE clauses
system_risk_controls.verification_method: Unit tests with malicious payloads (CRITICAL GAP: NOT VERIFIED)

system_risk_controls.description: Database transaction management for answer persistence
system_risk_controls.implementation: Spring @Transactional ensures atomic saves with rollback
Validation of interview data integrity at module boundaries
Backend verifies consent persistence and returns confirmation

critical.description: SQL injection protection via escapeString not verified
critical.recommendation: Add unit tests with malicious SQL payloads in label values

critical.description: Patient-ui has only 52 test files for 671+ TypeScript source files (7.7% coverage)
critical.recommendation: Establish systematic unit testing with 80%+ coverage for safety-critical modules

high.description: No integration test for interview-to-rule-engine data integrity
high.recommendation: Add end-to-end test validating complete data flow

high.description: Urgency indicator visibility not tested with actual practitioners
high.recommendation: Conduct usability testing for urgency indicator prominence

high.description: Rule package ordering and interaction testing incomplete
high.recommendation: Add integration tests with clinical review of outcomes

medium.description: HealthData service failure handling not fully tested
medium.recommendation: Add integration tests with mock HealthData returning errors

blocking_items.required_action: Security testing with malicious SQL payloads

blocking_items.description: Urgency indicator visibility not usability tested

blocking_items.required_action: Increase test coverage to 80%+ for safety-critical components

required_actions_before_release: Complete security testing for SQL injection (SYS-HAZ-006)
Conduct usability testing for urgency indicator visibility (SYS-HAZ-004)
Increase test coverage for safety-critical UI components
Clinical review and sign-off on hazard assessments
risk_acceptability.overall_residual_risk_statement: Overall residual risk is conditionally acceptable. 6 of 8 system hazards reduced to low/ALARP. 2 hazards require verification activities before final acceptance. Benefits of triage system (efficient care routing, 24/7 availability, consistent assessment) outweigh residual risks when blocking items resolved.
